acceptance_checks: At least one completed lane-scout task is queued.
Every queue item points to an existing source task and evidence path.
Every queue item has a local-only action scope.
Every queue item has forbidden gates.
No external service request, account, wallet, payment, trade, submission, public action, worker/runtime, model/MCP call, or external side effect occurred.

recommended_next_local_proof: Have lane managers claim the top ranked queue item and create only the named local artifact/parser/checker/draft. If the next action needs account, wallet, payment, trade, submission, public action, worker/runtime, model/MCP, or external API access, create a separate approval packet instead of executing it.
summary: This queue converts completed lane-scout packets into ranked local-only next proofs. It is a dispatch surface for future agents, not approval for accounts, wallets, payments, trades, submissions, public actions, runtimes, model/MCP calls, or external APIs.
